\tzpentry{ID3895}{Holonomy Berry-Phase Berry Phase}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3895 introduces Holonomy Berry-Phase Berry Phase as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \gamma_{\text{Berry}} = i\oint_{\mathcal{C}} \langle n(\mathbf{R})| \nabla_{\mathbf{R}} |n(\mathbf{R})\rangle \cdot d\mathbf{R} = \int_{\mathcal{S}} \mathbf{F}_{\text{Berry}} \cdot d\mathbf{S} \end{equation}
